inputPort.markdownDescription:
TCP port for Forward protocol input

TCP port where Log10x listens for incoming Fluent Forward protocol messages. Supports all standard Forward protocol modes (Message, Forward, PackedForward). Each incoming record is decoded from msgpack and emitted as JSON for the pipeline.  Example: `24224` (Default: 24224)

inputPath.markdownDescription:
Unix socket path for Forward protocol input (overrides port)

Unix domain socket path where Log10x listens for incoming Fluent Forward protocol messages. When set, takes precedence over the TCP port.  Example: `/tmp/tenx-forward-in.sock`

sourcePattern.markdownDescription:
Event source capture regex pattern

Defines a regex pattern to capture 'source' values for each transformed TenXObject. The Forward protocol tag is injected into each record as a "tag" field. The default pattern extracts this tag as the event source. (Default: "tag":"(.*?)")
